facebook.caption: POV: you took a wrong turn in Phú Quốc and ended up at Chill Bar Đồi Trăng. 4.8 stars. 157 reviews. And somehow you almost walked past it. This is the kind of bar locals quietly rate while tourists scroll past. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking up to Chill Bar Đồi Trăng while everyone else is at the resort bar. 4.8 stars. 157 people already knew. Now you do too.

instagram.caption: Took a wrong turn. Found Chill Bar Đồi Trăng. 4.8★, 157 reviews, zero regrets. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Everyone at the resort bar. You at Chill Bar Đồi Trăng. 4.8 stars. Different level.

tiktok.caption: Wrong turn. Best turn. Chill Bar Đồi Trăng hits different 🌙 #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocBars #VietnamTravel
